---
title: "fr_besgsdag_1_screening"
subtitle: "`fr_besgsdag_1_screening`"
description: "fr_besgsdag_1_screening"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/fr_besgsdag_1_screening/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                      | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                          |
|---------------------------|------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                   | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                   |
| `center`                  | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                |
| `bloodsamples_order_wfv1` | bloodsamples_order_wfv1      | string | Bloodsamples for screening ordered. Workflow. Visit 1.                                                                               |
| `cgm_ready_wfv1`          | cgm_ready_wfv1               | string | CGM charged and ready. Workflow. Visit 1.                                                                                            |
| `cgm_zip_wfv1`            | cgm_zip_wfv1                 | string | Confirms that a zip bag has been prepared with the CGM sensor number and the participant ID number written on it. Workflow. Visit 1. |
| `sens_ready_wfv1`         | sens_ready_wfv1              | string | Zip bag with SENS activity tracker etc ready. Workflow. Visit 1.                                                                     |
| `sens_sign_in_wfv1`       | sens_sign_in_wfv1            | string | Indicates if the participant with is signed in in the SENS webapp. Workflow. Visit 1.                                                |
| `liva_ready_wfv1`         | liva_ready_wfv1              | string | Indicate whether the participant has been created on the Liva platform. Workflow. Visit 1.                                           |

: Fields in the `fr_besgsdag_1_screening` resource.
